question: What is the position of the person on stage playing a musical instrument in the image? Select from the following options: (A) Standing on the left side of the stage. (B) Standing in front of the band. (C) Sitting on a chair in the center of the stage. (D) None of the above.
gold_answer: Standing in front of the band
answer_choices: Standing on the left side of the stage
Standing in front of the band
Sitting on a chair in the center of the stage
inpaint_prompt: Fill the masked region naturally, removing whatever objects appear there. Preserve the rest of the image exactly.
